ip_outcome_note: Card name is 'Hercule, Buu's Assistant'. Vision confirms heavyset man with prominent thick black mustache, theatrical bravado pose — canonical Mr. Satan / Hercule design. Named card.

trivia_bullets.text: Hercule (Mr. Satan in the original Japanese) is the reigning World Martial Arts Champion who took public credit for defeating Cell at the Cell Games — a victory actually won by Gohan. Since then he has been worshipped by nearly the entire population of Earth and has become fabulously wealthy. [Dragon Ball Wiki: Mr. Satan, via WebSearch snippet; CBR: 'Dragon Ball Z: Hercule Was (Unintentionally) a Hero During the Cell Games']
sources: Dragon Ball Wiki: Mr. Satan, via WebSearch snippet

trivia_bullets.text: Following Goku and allies' defeat of Majin Buu, Goku and his friends willingly allowed Hercule to again claim public credit — both to respect his genuine friendship with Buu and because the Z Warriors have no interest in public recognition. The three-saga credit arc (Cell Games, Buu Saga, Tournament of Power spectator) establishes Hercule as the franchise's canonical face of credited labor over actual labor. [Wikipedia: Mr. Satan; Dragon Ball Wiki: Mr. Satan, via WebSearch snippets]
sources: Wikipedia: Mr. Satan, via WebSearch snippet
Dragon Ball Wiki: Mr. Satan, via WebSearch snippet

trivia_bullets.text: Hercule's role in the Buu Saga contains a genuine pivot: his friendship with Fat Buu was instrumental in calming the creature and ultimately influenced Buu's final-form choice of mercy over destruction. Hercule's labor here was real — but the public credit remained structured around his manufactured champion persona. [CBR: 'Dragon Ball: The World Protector's Mr. Satan, Explained', via WebSearch snippet]

In Dragon Ball Super's Universe Survival Arc, Hercule serves primarily as emotional anchor for Majin Buu's participation in the Tournament of Power exhibition matches — Buu's ring-clearing rage was directly triggered by Hercule being hurt. Hercule was not selected for Universe 7's tournament team. [Dragon Ball Wiki: Universe Survival Saga, via WebSearch snippet]
sources: Dragon Ball Wiki: Universe Survival Saga, via WebSearch snippet

related_cards.note: Hercule's canonical friendship partner; the Buu-Hercule bond is foundational to Buu Saga resolution

related_cards.name: Videl, Gohan's Partner
related_cards.note: Videl is Hercule's daughter; family cohort

related_cards.name: Gohan
related_cards.note: Gohan defeated Cell; Hercule took the credit
